metadata.rationale: The article is grounded in a real online controversy over an AI-generated propaganda clip shared by Iranian state-linked media, but it overstates that media circulation into an official Iranian warning or concrete military message. Its visuals are also edited and framed in ways that make symbolic or synthetic propaganda look like authentic strike imagery.
